content.rendered:
A diverse team needs a system that speaks their language — literally. When people struggle to understand menus or policies, mistakes happen and adoption drops. Attendo makes things easier by letting every user choose the language they’re most comfortable with, so the platform feels familiar, clear, and welcoming to everyone.

Key Capabilities

Instant Language Switcher: You’ll find the language dropdown right in the top header, letting you switch languages on the spot. The interface updates instantly — no reloads, no logging out, no hassle.

RTL Support: If you use an RTL language like Arabic or Hebrew, the entire layout shifts automatically. Sidebars, menus, grids — everything flips naturally to match your reading flow.

Remembers Your Preference: Pick your language once, and Attendo keeps it in mind. The next time you sign in, your dashboard greets you in the language you chose.

Fully Localized Experience: It’s not just the main menu — buttons, errors, alerts, and tooltips all adapt to your language for a smooth, consistent experience from start to finish.

How It Works

  1. Locate: Find the Language Selector (e.g., “English”) in the top right navigation bar.
  2. Select: Choose your desired language from the dropdown list.
  3. Engage: The system text transforms instantly.
